title: campylotropis microphylla
intro: Campylotropis microphylla, also known as the small-flowered Campylotropis, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Campylotropis microphylla can be found in traditional Chinese medicine, often in the form of teas, infusions, or dried extracts.
